content.speakerText: I've already updated the project tracker and briefed Sarah on my tasks.
content.speakerTextCn: 我已经更新了项目进度表，并跟莎拉交代了手头工作。
expectedAnswers: Thanks for being proactive. Is there anything urgent I should prepare for?
Great job — just keep me updated if anything changes.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达认可与支持
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，是否使用场景关键词（e.g., proactive, updated, briefed）
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者口语习惯，避免生硬或书面化表达
关键词覆盖：是否至少使用一个场景高频词（如proactive, lifesaver, keep me posted）

content.speakerText: I'll be available by email for anything critical.
content.speakerTextCn: 如果有紧急事，我随时在线回复邮件。
expectedAnswers: Perfect. Don't overdo it though — rest up!
Thanks for being reachable, but please don't feel obligated to check emails during your time off.
Got it. We'll handle anything urgent — you deserve a break.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否体现关怀、鼓励休息，而非利用对方
语言准确性：是否正确使用情态动词（don't, shouldn't）和语气词（though, though）
表达自然度：是否避免命令式或冷漠语气，使用温暖、支持性表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用场景关键词（critical, rest up, overdo it）
